title: Cytotoxic Chemotherapy in Advanced Pancreatic Cancer.
abstract:
1. Hematol Oncol Clin North Am. 2022 Oct;36(5):1011-1018. doi: 
10.1016/j.hoc.2022.07.006. Epub 2022 Sep 22.

Cytotoxic Chemotherapy in Advanced Pancreatic Cancer.

Rehman M(1), Khaled A(2), Noel M(3).

Author information:
(1)Georgetown Lombardi Comprehensive Care Center, 3800 Reservoir Road Northwest, 
Washington, DC 20007, USA. Electronic address: muneeb.s.rehman@medstar.net.
(2)Georgetown University School of Medicine, 3800 Reservoir Road Northwest, 
Washington, DC 20007, USA.
(3)Georgetown Lombardi Comprehensive Care Center, 3800 Reservoir Road Northwest, 
Washington, DC 20007, USA.

Advanced pancreatic cancer remains one of the deadliest malignancies in 2022. 
Although there has been significant progress in treatment options with improved 
outcomes in many cancers, this growth has been slow in pancreatic cancer. This 
article examines specific components of approved first- and second-line 
therapies for advanced pancreatic cancer treatment and their effectiveness and 
concludes with a brief exploration of future directions for targeted therapies.
